questions.question: Explain the difference between MPI_Scatter and MPI_Bcast with suitable examples.
expectedPoints: MPI_Bcast sends identical data to all processes
MPI_Scatter distributes different portions of data to different processes
Example: Bcast for sending parameters, Scatter for distributing array chunks

questions.question: Describe a scenario where you would use MPI_Allreduce instead of MPI_Reduce, and explain the advantages of your choice.
expectedPoints: Scenario: Parallel algorithm where all processes need the final result
Advantage: Avoids additional communication step to broadcast result
Example: Convergence checking in iterative methods
Performance consideration: May be more efficient than Reduce + Bcast
